TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tanguhla, Dinkam Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Tanguhla/Dinkam a niyaro', 42 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 147 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 145 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun82%, Rukai1%, Tayal1%, Cou9%, Hla'alua4%, Amis1%, roma1%.
S.PHON: taŋo~u~uħɾa, ɬ~ɮinkam itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u taŋo~u~uħɾa/ɬ~ɮinkam a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, ro~u~ukai*%, tajaɾ*%, ʦo~uo~u~u*%, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua*%, amis*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Tanguhla, Dinkam Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Tanguhla/Dinkam a niyaro', 42 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 147 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 145 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun82%, Rukai1%, Tayal1%, Cou9%, Hla'alua4%, Amis1%, roma1%.
S.PHON: taŋo~u~uħɾa, ɬ~ɮinkam itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u taŋo~u~uħɾa/ɬ~ɮinkam a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, ro~u~ukai*%, tajaɾ*%, ʦo~uo~u~u*%, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua*%, amis*%, ro~uma*%.
